name: Chicken and Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1/2 - 1 inch cubes.
2. Combine PACE Picante Sauce, soy sauce, water, cornstarch, and sugar or sugar substitute in a small bowl; set aside.
3. Heat vegetable oil (or spray non-stick pan with cooking spray) in a large skillet on high heat.
4. Add chicken and stir-fry 3-4 minutes or until cooked through.
5. Add remaining oil (optional), onion, garlic, ginger, broccoli, peppers.
6. Stir-fry vegetables for 3 minutes or until crisp-tender.
7. Add PACE Picante Sauce mixture; stir-fry about 1 minute or until sauce thickens.
Any bottled PACE Picante Sauce can be used, or if you have a recipe, use your own.
